focus: Repetitive single-character string producing all palindrome lengths 1..8; tests full-range, sub-range, and single-index queries.
Mixed alphanumeric and special characters with overlapping palindromes (e.g., '1!1', 'ab1!1ba', 'XYZZZYX', 'abcba'); checks detection of varied palindrome lengths and small-range queries.

Large odd-length full-string palindrome (length 99) constructed by mirroring a 49-char base with a center char; stresses performance and wide-range LCM queries across many unique odd palindrome lengths.
